title: TrustForge Permission Request
description: An AI agent's typed request to acquire authority for a specific action, target, and duration. The daemon validates the request, runs the policy engine, optionally collects approvals, and replies with a PermissionGrant or a denial. See TF-0006 "dynamic permission negotiation".

request_version.description: Version of the permission-request schema itself.

id.description: Stable identifier for this request; copied into the matching PermissionGrant.

instance.description: Specific running instance of the agent.

human.description: Human principal the agent is acting on behalf of.

tool.description: Tool the agent intends to invoke once the permission is granted.

target.description: Target the action will operate on (file path, record id, URL, ...).

risk.description: Agent's self-declared risk class for the action.

danger_tags.description: Danger tags the agent already knows apply.

duration_seconds.description: Maximum lifetime the agent is asking for; the daemon may cap it.

proof_level_offered.description: Highest proof level the agent can produce if challenged.

context.description: Free-form context the daemon and approvers can use.
